# ARDLABS®

> ARDLABS is a digital engineering studio based in Prague, working worldwide
> in English and French. We design and build software, platforms and AI
> systems that are fast, reliable, and refined to the detail.

Four service poles cover an idea end to end: Strategy & Consulting,
Design & Development, Data & AI, and Cloud & Infrastructure.

Contact: info@ardlabs.eu

## Services

- [Strategy & Consulting](https://ardlabs.eu/en/services/strategy): technology consulting, applied R&D, product prototyping, technical due diligence.
- [Design & Development](https://ardlabs.eu/en/services/software): custom software, web & mobile apps, SaaS platforms, internal systems, design systems.
- [Data & AI](https://ardlabs.eu/en/services/ai): applied AI, intelligent automation, data pipelines, dashboards and internal tools.
- [Cloud & Infrastructure](https://ardlabs.eu/en/services/cloud): cloud architecture, deployment, APIs & integrations, CI/CD, observability.
